title: veronica subfulvida
intro_study: According to "Complementary therapies in medicine", Veronica subfulvida benefits include relieving menstrual pain.
side_effects: Veronica subfulvida can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems in sensitive individuals. Prolonged consumption of its extracts may also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, improper use of Veronica subfulvida may cause cardiovascular problems, such as increased heart rate and blood pressure. Furthermore, its improper use during pregnancy or breastfeeding may result in complications for the mother and the fetus/newborn.
